title: Wirenut
description: An everyday kitchen sink style modpack designed to enhance every aspect of your gameplay. Whether you're a builder, explorer, or tech enthusiast.
body:
![Wirenut Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d3af58609df18fafb3743419a33fd625c2de36d_0.webp)
The Wirenut modpack has been around for a number of years. Wirenut is a small comminity of gamers who enjoy playing games together.

We have been running Minecraft servers over the last 10+ years. After a number of years running various servers and a bit of a break. We are delighted to launch our Minecraft kitchen sink modpack on Modrinth.

Embark on a Minecraft adventure with Wirenut, an everyday kitchen sink style modpack designed to enhance every aspect of your gameplay. Whether you're a builder, explorer, or tech enthusiast, Wirenut offers a diverse range of mods to suit your playstyle.
- **Innovative Technology:** Master advanced systems with mods like Applied Energistics 2, Mekanism, and Immersive Engineering. Automate processes, manage resources, and create complex machinery.
- **Expansive Exploration:** Discover breathtaking landscapes with Biomes O' Plenty and navigate them effortlessly using JourneyMap.
- **Enhanced Gameplay:** Streamline your experience with mods like Roughly Enough Items (REI), Mouse Tweaks, and Inventory Essentials.
- **Dynamic Playstyles:** Dive into intricate mechanics with Integrated Dynamics and Modern Industrialization, or collaborate with friends using Odyssey Guilds and Odyssey Claims.
- **Creative Building:** Add flair to your creations with Rechiseled and Fusion, transforming your builds into works of art.

Wirenut is designed for both client and server environments, ensuring compatibility and a seamless multiplayer experience. Whether you're automating factories, exploring new biomes, or crafting architectural masterpieces, Wirenut empowers you to redefine your Minecraft journey.
